mapper.sql: id, user_id, feedback_type, target_id, rating, comment, is_resolved, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_feedback (user_id, feedback_type, target_id, rating, comment, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{feedbackType}, #{targetId}, #{rating}, #{comment}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_feedback WHERE feedback_type = #{feedbackType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT FROM ai_feedback WHERE feedback_type = #{feedbackType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM ai_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId}
